HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT RAHUL VASQUEZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. RAHUL VASQUEZ HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ANSWER SUBMITTED BY RAHUL VASQUEZ WAS STRICKEN. THERE ARE NO OTHER FIILNGS TO STRIKE.
